channel.title: OnOptions
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnOptions, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Gen Alpha can’t write emails to grandma without ChatGPT. It’s time for a ‘Digital Harm Tax’
item.description: I nearly lost my own life to social media. Phone bans and lawsuits aren't enough.

item.title: Inside the xAI exodus: Meet the dozens of people who have left Elon Musk’s AI company
item.description: Amid a merger with SpaceX, a $60 billion option to acquire the AI company Cursor, and an upcoming public offering, Elon Musk’s xAI firm is still losin...

item.title: Trump’s Canada trade war hits Jack Daniel’s and Jim Beam with a devastating $143 million loss
item.description: Last year, Canada was one of the most reliable international buyers of American whiskey . Now it’s become one of the industry’s biggest losses. U.S. s...

item.title: Officials charge a U.S. soldier for using intel on this $400K Polymarket bet
item.description: A U.S. special forces soldier involved in the military operation to capture Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro has been charged with using classified...

item.title: The Number 1 Pick in the NFL Draft Just Gave a Master Class in Emotional Intelligence. Here Are 3 Lessons
item.description: Fernando Mendoza is the number one pick of the 2026 NFL draft. A recent interview shows how he got here: not just because of his physical ability, but...

item.title: BTS Joins the Celebrity Business Boom With Food and Drink Brand Arih
item.description: Fresh off a four-year hiatus, the K-pop group just launched a Walmart-exclusive line of noodles, energy drinks, and sodas.

item.title: Mythos access by Discord group reveals real danger of AI-powered hacking
item.description: The unauthorized access to Anthropic's Mythos cybersecurity model wasn't just a breach.

item.title: Why Small Experiments Are the Secret to Faster Business Growth
AI Is Changing Growth, but These 5 Strategies Still Win
item.description: New tech, same fundamentals. AI hasn’t rewritten all the rules.

item.title: Forget LinkedIn—Amazon’s Andy Jassy started a chicken wing eating club to network when he first moved to Seattle for work
item.description: Before the Amazon C-suite, Andy Jassy was hosting weekly chicken wing nights to network with his peers—a lesson for Gen Z in the power of genuine conn...

item.title: Your Company Culture Is Being Built
item.description: It’s happening whether you’re paying attention or not.

item.title: Trump administration vows crackdown on China’s ‘exploiting’ of AI models made in the U.S.
item.description: The Trump administration is vowing to crack down on foreign tech companies’ exploitation of U.S. artificial intelligence models, singling out China at...

item.title: Meta executive says he only gets stressed five times a year and that it’s actually a ‘useful signal’
item.description: Meta’s chief technology officer Andrew Bosworth says being busy with important matters on the table is his stress “trigger”—he calms down with exercis...

item.title: These 3 key elements are what every change strategy needs
item.description: Experts have a lot of ideas about persuasion . Some suggest leveraging social proof to show that people have adopted the idea and had a positive exper...

item.title: ‘This is very transformative for the business’: Lyft’s head of growth on taking a big step into London’s black cab sector
item.description: The ride-hailing giant has agreed to acquire Gett UK, making it the largest app for London's iconic black cabs. Lyft's EVP for global growth, an Arsen...
